sentences.target: Il y a du désordre partout ici.

translations.fr: Il y a du désordre partout ici.
translations.es: Hay desorden por todas partes aquí.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里到处都是乱七八糟。
translations.pt: Há bagunça por toda parte aqui.
translations.vi: Ở đây bừa bộn khắp nơi.
translations.ja: ここはあちこち散らかっている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used in the existential construction ‘il y a’.
Clitic locative pronoun contributing ‘there’ in ‘il y a’.
3rd person singular present of ‘avoir’; main verb in the existential pattern ‘il y a’ (‘there is/are’).
Partitive article (contraction of ‘de’ + ‘le’) marking an unspecified quantity.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase after the partitive article.
Adverb indicating ubiquity.
Deictic adverb indicating location.

sentences.target: On doit ranger ce désordre avant midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁɑ̃ʒe sə dezɔʁdʁ avɑ̃ midi/

translations.fr: On doit ranger ce désordre avant midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa ʁɑ̃ʒe sə dezɔʁdʁ avɑ̃ midi/
translations.en: We have to tidy this mess before noon.
translations.es: Tenemos que recoger este lío antes del mediodía.
translations.de: Wir müssen dieses Chaos bis Mittag aufräumen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo mettere in ordine questo disordine prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.ko: 정오 전에 이 엉망을 정리해야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得在中午前把这些杂乱收拾好。
translations.yue: 我哋要喺中午之前執拾好呢度嘅亂。
translations.ru: Нужно прибрать этот беспорядок до полудня.
translations.pt: Temos que arrumar essa bagunça antes do meio-dia.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לסדר את הבלגן הזה לפני הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải dọn dẹp mớ bừa bộn này trước trưa.
translations.ar: يجب أن نرتب هذه الفوضى قبل الظهر.
translations.nl: We moeten deze rommel voor de middag opruimen.
translations.uk: Ми маємо прибрати цей безлад до полудня.
translations.hu: Ezt a rendetlenséget délig rendbe kell tennünk.
translations.hi: हमें दोपहर से पहले इस बिखराव को साफ करना होगा.
translations.pl: Musimy posprzątać ten bałagan przed południem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τακτοποιήσουμε αυτή την ακαταστασία πριν το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Vi må rydde opp i dette rotet før klokka tolv.
translations.id: Kita harus membereskan kekacauan ini sebelum tengah hari.
translations.sv: Vi måste städa upp den här röran före klockan tolv.
translations.ro: Trebuie să facem ordine în dezordinea asta înainte de prânz.
translations.cs: Musíme uklidit tenhle nepořádek před polednem.
translations.da: Vi skal rydde op i dette rod inden klokken tolv.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää siivota tämä sotku ennen puoltapäivää.
translations.ja: 正午までにこの散らかりを片付けないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (‘one/we’).
3rd person singular present of the modal verb ‘devoir’ expressing obligation.
Infinitive verb complement to ‘devoir’ indicating the required action.
Demonstrative determiner introducing the noun.
Common noun, direct object of ‘ranger’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Noun denoting time; complement of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: Je m’excuse pour le désordre dans l’entrée.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɛkskyz puʁ lə dezɔʁdʁ dɑ̃ lɑ̃tʁe/

translations.fr: Je m’excuse pour le désordre dans l’entrée.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɛkskyz puʁ lə dezɔʁdʁ dɑ̃ lɑ̃tʁe/
translations.en: Sorry for the mess in the entryway.
translations.es: Perdón por el desorden en la entrada.
translations.de: Entschuldigung für das Durcheinander im Eingangsbereich.
translations.vi: Xin lỗi vì lối vào bừa bộn.
translations.nl: Sorry voor de rommel in de hal.
translations.hi: प्रवेश द्वार पर बिखराव के लिए माफ़ कीजिए.
translations.el: Συγγνώμη για την ακαταστασία στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Maaf atas kekacauan di pintu masuk.
translations.cs: Omlouvám se za nepořádek v předsíni.
translations.ja: 玄関が散らかっていてすみません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Reflexive verb form with attached clitic ‘m’ (me); 1st person singular present of ‘excuser’ used to apologize.
Preposition introducing the reason or topic.
Definite article marking specificity of the following noun.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘pour’ via the determiner ‘le’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Noun with elided definite article ‘l’ before a vowel; complement of ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Le désordre me stresse quand je travaille.
sentences.reading: /lə dezɔʁdʁ mə stʁɛs kɑ̃ ʒə tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Le désordre me stresse quand je travaille.
translations.ipa: /lə dezɔʁdʁ mə stʁɛs kɑ̃ ʒə tʁavaj/
translations.en: Mess stresses me out when I work.
translations.es: El desorden me estresa cuando trabajo.
translations.de: Unordnung stresst mich, wenn ich arbeite.
translations.it: Il disordine mi stressa quando lavoro.
translations.ko: 일할 때 어질러져 있으면 스트레스를 받아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 工作时杂乱让我压力很大。
translations.yue: 我做嘢嘅時候，亂會令我好有壓力。
translations.ru: Когда я работаю, беспорядок меня напрягает.
translations.pt: A bagunça me estressa quando trabalho.
translations.vi: Sự bừa bộn khiến tôi căng thẳng khi làm việc.
translations.nl: Rommel stresst me als ik werk.
translations.uk: Безлад мене стресує, коли я працюю.
translations.hi: काम करते समय बिखराव मुझे तनाव देता है.
translations.el: Η ακαταστασία με αγχώνει όταν δουλεύω.
translations.nb: Rot stresser meg når jeg jobber.
translations.id: Kekacauan membuat saya stres saat bekerja.
translations.sv: Stök gör mig stressad när jag jobbar.
translations.da: Rod gør mig stresset, når я arbejder.
translations.fi: Sotku stressaa minua, kun teen töitä.
translations.ja: 私は仕事中、散らかりがあるとストレスを感じます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the subject noun.
Common noun serving as the subject.
1st person singular clitic object pronoun; marks the affected person.
3rd person singular present; main verb expressing causation of stress.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
1st person singular subject pronoun of the subordinate clause.
1st person singular present; main verb of the subordinate clause.
